response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but the absence of modern C++ in commercial routing systems and explicit exposure to routing tiling, real-time traffic integration, or map data optimization raises significant gaps.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency backend work
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ or Rust development in routing or navigation systems
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data pipelines, or geospatial optimization
Minimal mention of distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or consistency in production routing contexts
